storylets.title: {=patron_marriage_title}A name from {PATRON_NAME}'s court
storylets.setup: {=patron_marriage_setup}{PATRON_NAME} sets his cup down with care, the way he does when the talk has gone serious. "Marriage is not done by passing a name. But I can pass a name. The right hall, the right hour, the right introduction. Tell me what you want of the match."

options.text: {=patron_marriage_alliance}An alliance, lord. Steel and land before sentiment.
options.tooltip: {=patron_marriage_alliance_tt}Patron writes the introduction with strategic phrasing. +10 renown. -2 relation for the cold framing.

options.text: {=patron_marriage_honest}Someone who would have me, lord. Truthfully written.
options.tooltip: {=patron_marriage_honest_tt}Patron writes a frank introduction. +5 renown, +3 patron relation, +1 honor.

options.text: {=patron_marriage_withdraw}Forget I asked, lord. The road is enough for now.
options.tooltip: {=patron_marriage_withdraw_tt}+3 relation. He nods. The cup goes back up.
